text: Preserve exact source provenance and every financial field required by the canonical LEDGER transaction contract.
target: Every accepted candidate identifies its explicitly selected owned account, original description, exact owner-economic signed amount, ZAR currency, transaction date, optional distinct posting date, source reference, source adapter version, source fingerprint, and deterministic identity within its source context without silent substitution, inline editing, or precision loss. Evidence: direct fixture spike plus FR-LEDGER-TRANSACTION-RECORDING.
